mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_log (alarm_id, alarm_type, message, url, created_at) VALUES (#{alarmId}, #{alarmType}, #{message}, #{url}, NOW())
INSERT INTO alarm_target (alarm_id, admin_id, role_id, is_read) VALUES (#{alarmId}, #{adminId}, #{roleId}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT al.alarm_id, al.alarm_type, al.message, al.url, al.created_at, at.target_id, at.is_read, at.read_at FROM alarm_log al JOIN alarm_target at ON al.alarm_id = at.alarm_id WHERE at.admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY al.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm_target WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_target SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT l.alarm_id, l.alarm_type, l.message, l.url, l.created_at, t.target_id, t.is_read, t.read_at FROM alarm_log l JOIN alarm_target t ON l.alarm_id = t.alarm_id WHERE t.admin_id = #{adminId} AND t.is_read = 0 ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO alarm_target (alarm_id, role_id, admin_id, is_read, read_at) SELECT #{alarmId} AS alarm_id, au.role_id AS role_id, au.admin_id AS admin_id, 0 AS is_read, NULL AS read_at FROM admin_user au WHERE au.status = 'ACTIVE' AND au.role_id IN
#{r}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(pi.inbound_qty) FROM product_inbound pi WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId}),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(po.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po WHERE po.product_id = #{productId}),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(sr.reserved_qty) FROM stock_reservation sr WHERE sr.product_id = #{productId}),0)
